content: Please assess the needs in City 1 following the earthquake. Your findings will be crucial for our resource allocation. Let me know the immediate medical and engineering needs.

I propose that we allocate 4 medical teams to City 1, 3 to City 2, and 3 to City 3, based on the assessments being conducted. For engineering crews, I suggest 2 in City 1, 2 in City 2, and 1 in City 3, given their respective needs. Lastly, I recommend allocating 1 supply convoy to each city to ensure timely delivery of essential resources.

The engineering crews and supply convoys may also require adjustments based on specific city needs.
